result.summary: Merchant API exposes a public MCP server at https://shoppingcontent.googleapis.com/mcp and an authenticated REST API on shoppingcontent.googleapis.com using Google OAuth 2.0 Bearer tokens.

google_oauth2.label: Google OAuth 2.0 access token for Merchant API
google_oauth2.setup: Create or choose a [Google Cloud project](https://developers.google.com/merchant/api/guides/quickstart/create-project), enable the Merchant API, and set up OAuth consent/credentials as described in [Set up authentication](https://developers.google.com/merchant/api/guides/quickstart/authentication). The easiest path is to use Google's OAuth flow to mint a token for your own Google account/merchant access; then send it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` when calling the API or MCP service.
